basics.name: Ruochong Zheng
basics.summary: M.S. student at Peking University working on generative world modeling, embodied video prediction, 3D scene understanding, and visual generation.

work.summary: Worked on autoregressive image generation, AR-decoder training, model migration, SFT data iteration, and automated evaluation.
highlights: Migrated AR image generation models from a 9B dense architecture to a 30B-A3B MoE backbone.
Built an end-to-end evaluation pipeline for checkpoint submission, prior-token generation, decoder inference, automated scoring, and web visualization.
Constructed knowledge-intensive, long-text rendering, Asian portrait, arXiv/chart data, and VLM/OCR evaluation sets.

publications.name: StateStream: Learning Predictive State for Embodied Video World Models
publications.summary: Predictive-state embodied video world model for long-horizon rollout, action-conditioned future evaluation, and observation-based state updates.

publications.name: BiHiTo: Biomolecular Hierarchy-inspired Tokenization
publications.summary: Hierarchical tokenizer for all-atom biomolecular structures.

publications.name: BioDynaSpec: Harmonic-Guided Spatio-Spectral Autoregressive Diffusion for Protein Dynamics Generation
publications.summary: Spatio-spectral generative modeling for long-horizon protein dynamics, reducing trajectory error by over 60% on ATLAS.

publications.name: Tune-Your-Style: Intensity-tunable 3D Style Transfer with Gaussian Splatting
publications.summary: Intensity-controllable 3D style transfer for Gaussian Splatting scenes.

publications.name: iSegMan: Interactive Segment-and-Manipulate 3D Gaussians
publications.summary: Interactive 3D Gaussian segmentation and manipulation framework.
